Comment.MultiLanguageText: Value in word from PLC analog input
Hardware signal out of nominal range alarm

LineComment.Text: - Based on input type (PT100, PT1000, 0-10V, -10+10V, RES600)
- Alarm generation if measurement is out of tolerance (Alarm reset in FB_alarms)
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Reaction to short-circuit : < 18 Ω -> SIMATIC S7: Bit 7 (IB x+1) = "1", Bit 0 = "0" and Bit 2 = "0"
See documentation: Analog input module AI 4xRTD/TC 2-/3-/4-wire HF (6ES7134-6JD00-0CA1)
No measurement value for PTC analog input ' bits 0 and 2 are handled in the related FB (Temperature)
Prewarning range: 550 Ω to 1650 Ω -> Bit 0 = "0", Bit 2 = "1"
See documentation Analog input module AI 4xRTD/TC 2-/3-/4-wire HF (6ES7134-6JD00-0CA1)
Copy HMI parameters (from OPC Parameters IHM) to HMI Datas (Used in PLC program)
Copy HMI Datas (Used in PLC program) to HMI (OPC Display HMI)
Download DataHMI to OPC (Only used to initialize OPC Datas)
Copy HMI Datas (Used in PLC program) to HMI (OPC Display HMI)
